Bash(git add src/web/landing.html src/web/input.html src/web/builder.html src/web/assets/css/evergreen.css dist/web/landing.html dist/web/input.html dist/web/builder.html dist/assets/css/evergreen.css package.json && git status)
Bash(git add src/web/landing.html src/web/input.html src/web/builder.html src/web/assets/css/evergreen.css package.json && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Migrate all three web pages to native USWDS v3

Replace per-page embedded <style> blocks \(32–118 selectors each\) with a
shared evergreen.css that contains only what USWDS cannot provide natively:
metric color tokens, hero/header/footer overrides, the split card, loader
spinner, metric group headers, severity badges, coverage bar, pill-selector
buttons, criteria layout, and accordion button inner styling.

- landing.html: usa-hero, usa-section, usa-process-list, usa-footer--slim
- input.html: usa-header--basic, usa-form/usa-form--large, usa-footer--slim;
  loader and spinner classes moved to evergreen.css
- builder.html: usa-header--basic, usa-button-group--segmented tabs,
  usa-breadcrumb, usa-card-group library grid, usa-accordion case rows,
  usa-textarea/usa-input form fields; JS updated for switchTab class toggle,
  breadcrumb list-item classes, card and accordion HTML structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add test/test-ui.ts package.json && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add design system migration test suite

6 static-analysis tests verify the USWDS migration is complete:
- landing.html, input.html, builder.html — USWDS classes present, old custom classes absent
- evergreen.css — all 17 sections and required selectors defined
- generator.ts — USWDS breadcrumb/footer chrome in report output
- No stale CSS variable references across any source file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Builder library redesign, persona run filter, and Engineering tab fixes

- Library: split into 'My org' / 'My partner orgs' sections; domain as card
  title; compact metadata line \(cases · author · single/multi-turn\); remove
  Export Sheet button; add Propel attribution and multiTurn flag to presets
- Persona filter: run-form Audience dropdown appears for suites with personas;
  filters rows by selected persona before eval; description auto-includes label
- Builder: show persona badge and multi-turn chip in collapsed row header;
  show seeded conversation history in expanded view \(read-only\)
- Engineering tab: collect latency/token data directly from Promptfoo output
  instead of calling Langfuse REST API; eliminates timing/availability errors
- Report: Results by Metric + Results by Severity as split side-by-side card,
  moved above Critical Failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
